trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 69.7 sitting in the ideal bullish momentum zone (55–70) — not overbought — MACD bullish crossover and price well above SMA-20 makes this the cleanest setup on today's screener.
Score 95, RSI 61.9 in the ideal momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover — AI semiconductor structural demand remains strong and this is a risk-on day tailor-made for high-quality growth names.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on with NASDAQ +1.4% and S&P 500 +1.0%, making this a good day to put cash to work. I'm adding LIVN and NVDA — both score 95 and have RSIs in the 55–70 sweet spot, avoiding the overbought crowd (FLYW, HUT, AMD all sitting 80–93 RSI) where reversal risk is elevated. With 5 open slots and cash above $500, deploying into quality momentum names is the right call.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted broad gains in a risk-on session as investor sentiment improved on easing trade tensions and resilient corporate earnings momentum. Technology led the advance, with the NASDAQ outperforming on continued AI infrastructure enthusiasm spanning semiconductors and cloud. The S&P 500 added 1.0% as traders rotated into growth names, reflecting renewed confidence in the economic soft-landing narrative.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日全面上揚，風險偏好情緒顯著改善，原因在於全球貿易緊張局勢有所舒緩，加上企業盈利動能維持穩健。科技板塊領漲，那斯達克指數跑贏大市，市場對人工智能基礎建設——涵蓋半導體及雲端運算——的熱情持續升溫。標普500指數上漲1.0%，投資者積極增持成長型股票，反映市場對經濟「軟著陸」情境的信心有所回升。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures the speed of a stock's price moves on a 0–100 scale. The 55–70 range is considered the 'momentum sweet spot': the stock is trending strongly upward but hasn't yet entered overbought territory where reversals become likely. Today's picks, LIVN (RSI 69.7) and NVDA (RSI 61.9), were chosen over screener names with RSIs of 80–93 precisely because extreme RSI readings often precede sharp pullbacks.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）以0至100的刻度衡量股價波動的速度。55至70的區間被視為「動量甜蜜點」：股價呈現強勢上行趨勢，但尚未進入容易引發反轉的超買區域。今日選入的LIVN（RSI 69.7）與NVDA（RSI 61.9），正是在眾多RSI高達80至93的個股中脫穎而出，原因是過高的RSI讀數往往預示急劇回調即將到來。
